milestoneTitle: Phase M9.14 — Unified active-highlight recipe + temporary shared orange accent. Every 'active' surface (nav chip, filter chip, dashboard panel + learn zone in the activation band) now uses the same visual language: a thin accent-colored border (--accent-border) with a tight glow (10px --accent-glow halo fading out), layered on the element's own background + warm shadow lift for activated panels. The three chip classes (.chip-learn/.chip-tools/.chip-projects), the four [data-section] overrides, and the three .dash-panel:has(...) rules all now resolve --base to a single --base-shared token at :root (currently #ff7a1a tangerine). Changing that one value retunes every highlight in the app at once; when per-section accent colors return later, the literals that were in place before M9.14 are recorded inline in /* was #XXX */ comments after each rule so restoration is a single find/replace. Activated panel transition now includes border-color so the accent ring fades in at the same 220ms rhythm as the glow.
